title: Add SKTouchCanvasView Blazor library with touch event support
body:
- [x] Create `source/SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Blazor/` library with touch types only (no gesture view, no SKCanvasView wrapper)
  - [x] SKTouchAction enum, SKTouchDeviceType enum, SKTouchEventArgs class
  - [x] SKTouchCanvasView Razor component + SKTouchInterop.js
  - [x] Project file (net9.0;net10.0) + _Imports.razor + README.md
- [x] Add touch demo page — single canvas with device-colored strokes, action/device counters, event log
- [x] Add unit tests — 15 tests, all passing
- [x] Update solution file, NavMenu, solution filters (Pack/Test) for CI
- [x] Fix Blazor 404 on GitHub Pages by adding `.nojekyll` to gh-pages root (disables Jekyll which strips `_framework/` dirs)
